ingredients: 5 medium spicy long green chiles, slit in half length-wise
procedure: Combine oil, garlic, lemon juice, chiles, milk, garam masala, dried basil, and salt to make a marinade.
Marinate the chicken in the marinade for about ½-1 hour.
Transfer chicken and marinade to a pot. Cover and cook over low heat until fully cooked and tender.
